messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
If the prior worker verdict is source-plausible but the gate failed only proof, source-term, section, or word-band checks, preserve that verdict and repair the failed fields. Do not invert the verdict unless the source boundary itself is wrong.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

action.description: May operations execute the regulated data export?

context.action_boundary: May operations execute the regulated data export?
context.anomaly_observed: A design review remains visible but is only planning; transfer release must prove abstract dataset-sensitivity class.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Export EXP-DOV-084 transfers dataset DS-84 to workspace DOV-RISK-4 for Dovetail Analytics on 2026-06-28.
Design review DES-DOV-084 approves architecture planning only and warns that sensitivity class must be verified before transfer.
Transfer release REL-DOV-084 covers restricted-risk dataset DS-84, workspace DOV-RISK-4, Dovetail Analytics, and export date 2026-06-28 before transfer.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Regulated data export is complete only when transfer release matches dataset, destination workspace, recipient entity, export date, and dataset-sensitivity class before transfer.

state_brief.current_position: source-bound action verification with adversarial cross-DNA repair
known_failure_risks: planning artifact treated as execution authority
adjacent source treated as exact source

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations execute the regulated data export?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; REL-DOV-084 omits explicit dataset-sensitivity class proof required by STD-DOV-084-P.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: DES-DOV-084 and policy both require verified sensitivity class before transfer; defect remains open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: 047-style abstract-field trap unresolved; transfer release does not close sensitivity class before 2026-06-28 execution.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-DOV-084-P requires transfer release to match dataset-sensitivity class before transfer; REL-DOV-084 and DES-DOV-084 fail exact match.

open_blockers: sensitivity class verification missing from transfer release
latest_worker_output.final_answer: Action may not proceed. REL-DOV-084 and DES-DOV-084 leave dataset-sensitivity class unverified against STD-DOV-084-P, preserving the abstract-field trap. Boundary remains open; escalate for exact closure evidence.
